---
title: "Uses"
page-layout: article
date: last-modified
date-format: iso
description: This is the description
title-block-banner: "#f8f9fa"
title-block-banner-color: "#3e3e3a"
published-title: Last updated
toc: true
toc-location: right
toc-title: "Contents"
---

This is the stuff I use. {{< meta date >}}

## Hardware

Macbook Pro M1 (2020)

iPhone 12 (2021)

Huawei P10

## Software

Mozilla Firefox

Reminders.app

Calendar.app

Dictionary

Numbers

Spark

Day One

Anybox

Netnewswire

Obsidian

Zotero

RStudio

Zettlr

Byword

Cot Editor

VS Code

Markedit

Kindle

iTerm2

Skim

Github Desktop

Acorn

Pixelmator

## Services
